requirement_topic.en: Formaldehyde in Wood-Based Panels — Voluntary AS/NZS 4266 Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: 木基板材甲醛——自愿性AS/NZS 4266证据
requirement_topic.zht: 木基板材甲醛——自願性AS/NZS 4266證據

summary.en: Australia does not operate a furniture-specific national mandatory formaldehyde emission approval regime equivalent to US TSCA Title VI or EU REACH Annex XVII Entry 77 for ordinary furniture. Wood-based panels and furniture should still be safe and not misleading under Australian Consumer Law. AS/NZS 4266 is commonly used as a voluntary Australian/New Zealand technical route for particleboard and fibreboard performance and formaldehyde emission evidence, especially where buyers specify E0/E1 or low-emission panel requirements.
summary.zh: 澳大利亚对普通家具没有类似美国TSCA第六章或欧盟REACH附件XVII第77条的家具专项全国强制甲醛释放批准制度。木基板材及家具仍须符合澳大利亚消费者法下的安全及不得误导要求。AS/NZS 4266通常作为澳大利亚/新西兰自愿性技术路径，用于刨花板和纤维板性能及甲醛释放证据，尤其在买方指定E0/E1或低释放板材要求时。
summary.zht: 澳洲對普通家具沒有類似美國TSCA第六章或歐盟REACH附件XVII第77條的家具專項全國強制甲醛釋放批准制度。木基板材及家具仍須符合澳洲消費者法下的安全及不得誤導要求。AS/NZS 4266通常作為澳洲/紐西蘭自願性技術路徑，用於刨花板和纖維板性能及甲醛釋放證據，尤其在買方指定E0/E1或低釋放板材要求時。

standards_or_laws: Competition and Consumer Act 2010, Schedule 2 — Australian Consumer Law
AS/NZS 4266 series — reconstituted wood-based panels, including particleboard and fibreboard performance and formaldehyde emission evidence (voluntary unless incorporated or contractually required)
Buyer low-emission panel specifications such as E0, E1, CARB/TSCA-equivalent, or project requirements where applicable

summary.en: Chinese furniture exporters commonly provide GB 18584 formaldehyde reports for wood furniture, panel supplier E0/E1 declarations, and production batch traceability. These can support an Australian file, but they are not a statutory substitute for buyer-specified AS/NZS 4266 evidence or Australian Consumer Law claim substantiation.
summary.zh: 中国家具出口商通常提供GB 18584木家具甲醛报告、板材供应商E0/E1声明及生产批次追溯记录。这些资料可支持澳大利亚文件，但不能作为买方指定AS/NZS 4266证据或澳大利亚消费者法宣称证明的法定替代。
summary.zht: 中國家具出口商通常提供GB 18584木家具甲醛報告、板材供應商E0/E1聲明及生產批次追溯記錄。這些資料可支持澳洲文件，但不能作為買方指定AS/NZS 4266證據或澳洲消費者法宣稱證明的法定替代。

standards_or_laws: GB 18584 — indoor decorating and refurbishing materials, wood furniture harmful substance limits
GB/T 39600 — formaldehyde emission grading for wood-based panels and finishing products
Supplier E0/E1 declarations and batch traceability records

gap.en: The gap is evidence alignment rather than a national pre-market approval. If the Australian listing claims low formaldehyde, E0, E1, non-toxic, eco, green, child-safe, or low-VOC performance, the importer should keep test reports tied to the panel batch and the claim standard. Where buyers request AS/NZS 4266, Chinese GB reports should be reviewed for method, unit, chamber conditions and class equivalence.
gap.zh: 差距在于证据对齐，而非全国上市前批准。如果澳大利亚销售页面宣称低甲醛、E0、E1、无毒、环保、绿色、儿童安全或低VOC性能，进口商应保存与板材批次和宣称标准对应的检测报告。如买方要求AS/NZS 4266，应审查中国GB报告的测试方法、单位、气候箱条件及等级等效性。
gap.zht: 差距在於證據對齊，而非全國上市前批准。如果澳洲銷售頁面宣稱低甲醛、E0、E1、無毒、環保、綠色、兒童安全或低VOC性能，進口商應保存與板材批次和宣稱標準對應的檢測報告。如買方要求AS/NZS 4266，應審查中國GB報告的測試方法、單位、氣候箱條件及等級等效性。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary standard route — AS/NZS 4266 is voluntary unless incorporated by law, contract, procurement rule or claim substantiation; Australian Consumer Law duties against unsafe or misleading goods remain mandatory
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or claim-driven depending on current China furniture and panel rules; GB reports do not automatically satisfy AS/NZS 4266 buyer evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not label AS/NZS 4266 as a national mandatory furniture law. Use it as voluntary or buyer-specified evidence for wood-based panels and formaldehyde emissions, and make sure any low-formaldehyde claims in Australia are substantiated by batch-linked test reports.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】不要将AS/NZS 4266标为澳大利亚全国强制家具法规。应将其作为木基板材及甲醛释放的自愿性或买方指定证据，并确保在澳大利亚作出的任何低甲醛宣称均有批次关联检测报告支持。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】不要將AS/NZS 4266標為澳洲全國強制家具法規。應將其作為木基板材及甲醛釋放的自願性或買方指定證據，並確保在澳洲作出的任何低甲醛宣稱均有批次關聯檢測報告支持。
